executiveSummary: AJ Auto Repair has been a trusted name in Oroville since 2004, with owner Jose building a loyal customer base through 20+ years of honest, quality work. Your 4.5 star rating on Yellow Pages confirms what your customers already know. But without a website, you're invisible to anyone who doesn't already know your name.

Here's the reality: 97% of people searching for local services start online. When someone's car breaks down in Oroville and they search 'auto repair near me,' they find competitors like Gilbert's Auto Remedy (who has a website and 280 reviews) or Braun's Auto Service — not AJ Auto Repair.

The fix is straightforward and affordable. A professional website with basic SEO would immediately put you on the map for local searches. Combined with a Google Review strategy, you could be competing with shops that have spent thousands more on marketing.

assessment.title: Current Digital Presence
points: NO website exists — you're completely absent from organic search results.
Listed on Yellow Pages, Nextdoor, and other directory sites — but you don't control these listings.
4.5 star rating on Yellow Pages — solid but lower than competitors who actively solicit reviews.
No email address publicly available — limits how customers can reach you.
No social media presence found — missing the opportunity to showcase work and build community.
20+ years of experience and customer trust not visible anywhere online.

assessment.title: What You're Missing Without a Website
points: Every customer who searches online for auto repair in Oroville goes to a competitor with a website.
You can't display your services, specialties, hours, or pricing anywhere you control.
Directory sites place competitor ads directly on your listing — sending YOUR potential customers to other shops.
No way to collect customer email addresses for repeat business reminders (oil change due, brake inspection, etc.).
Younger customers (25-45) overwhelmingly research auto repair shops online before calling — you're missing this entire demographic.

assessment.title: Competitive Landscape
points: Gilbert's Auto Remedy leads with a functioning website and 280 reviews at 4.8 stars.
Lakeside Auto & Diesel also has no website — whoever moves first wins the online visibility race.
Braun's Auto Service appears in directory listings but may not have a strong website either.
Big O Tires and chain shops dominate search results with corporate SEO budgets — but local shops win on trust and reviews.
The auto repair market in Oroville has room for a local shop to dominate online with minimal investment.

findings.finding: NO website — completely invisible in organic search
Zero ability to capture leads from online searches
4.5 stars on YP — needs more reviews and higher rating to compete
No public email — limits customer communication channels
No Facebook, Instagram, or social presence
Competitors' ads appear on your directory listings
20+ years experience not leveraged in marketing

strategy.title: Phase 1: Get Online (Months 1-2)
actions: Build professional 5-page website: Home, Services, About Jose (20+ year story), Reviews, Contact.
Mobile-first design with prominent phone number, click-to-call, and contact form.
SEO targeting: 'auto repair Oroville CA,' 'mechanic near me Oroville,' 'affordable car repair Butte County.'
Set up branded email and Google Business Profile optimization.
Launch aggressive review solicitation to grow from 4.5 to 4.8+ stars.
Add LocalBusiness schema markup for Google Maps visibility.

strategy.title: Phase 2: Build Presence (Months 3-5)
actions: Blog content: car maintenance tips, seasonal prep guides, common repair cost breakdowns.
Set up Facebook page with work photos and customer testimonials.
Claim all directory listings with consistent NAP info.
Create service-specific pages: brakes, oil changes, diagnostics, AC repair.
Customer email list for service reminders and seasonal promotions.

strategy.title: Phase 3: Growth (Months 6-12)
actions: City-specific landing pages for nearby areas.
Google Ads for high-intent auto repair keywords.
Monthly reporting on traffic, leads, and review growth.

pricingIntro: AJ Auto Repair needs a website built from scratch. Our packages include everything — website build, hosting, SEO, and ongoing marketing — so you can focus on what you do best: fixing cars.
